HERO.DESC: Fullstack developer focused on building clean, scalable systems. I care as much about a well-designed API as I do about the interface that consumes it.

ABOUT.LABEL: about me
ABOUT.HEADLINE: Developer passionate about building useful, well-structured solutions.
ABOUT.DESC: I have experience building backend applications with Spring Boot, frontend applications with Angular and mobile apps using Flutter, taking part in multiple phases of the development lifecycle. I adapt well to new environments and technologies, and I particularly value code quality, maintainability and continuous learning. I also have a strong interest in artificial intelligence and enjoy exploring how it can be applied to solve complex real-world problems. Outside of the keyboard, I love animals, video games and TV shows.
